---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Propose a new dashboard feature, chart, or UI optimization
title: 'feat: [Brief Feature Description]'
labels: ['enhancement', 'frontend']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Problem / Pain Point
Is your feature request related to a problem or limitation? Please describe clearly. E.g., "It's hard to visualize average latency over 24 hours because the current chart only shows raw success count..."

## 🎨 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of the UI/UX or functionality improvement you want to see. Explain how this enhances the visualization or management of CPA2API.

## 📐 Layout / Design Ideas
If you have a design or layout mockup in mind, describe it here (e.g., placing a new toggle button on the settings card, or a new tab in the analytics panel).

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative visual representations or workarounds you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshot references, or external charting library recommendations here.
